violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine requires more frequent cleaning--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - vent hood requires a thorough cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floor around the grill requires cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
